name: Survivor:Stay In The Light
short_description: Stay in the light, hunt the dark. Create your own hero through the four dimensions of role, skill, talent, and blessing outside the battle. In the battle, choose the most suitable equipment and weapons strategically to improve your strength and continue to fight.
detailed_description:
"Survivor: Stay In The Light" is an action meat pigeon game. By matching heroes with different characteristics, skills, talents, and blessings to create your own characteristic heroes, you can improve your strength by choosing different equipment and weapons during the battle. fighting.
About heroes, each hero has different initial weapons and unique growth
Regarding talent, talent is a basic enhancement, choose the appropriate enhancement method
Regarding the blessing, the blessing of the gods is an extremely expensive and powerful game-changing mechanism, be careful not to disappoint the gods
Regarding skills, powerful skills will help players survive from desperation, so remember to use them

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal
